description: Curated retrieval eval over a frozen fixture corpus: Cambridge CS Tripos 2023-2025, Papers 1-3, materialised at data/eval_fixtures/cambridge_2023_2025_p1_p3/ and indexed with `python scripts/index_chunks.py --input data/eval_fixtures/cambridge_2023_2025_p1_p3 --collection cam-cs-tripos-fixture --metadata data/papers/metadata.json --chroma-dir ./chroma_data`. The indexed fixture contains 87 question-level chunks, 329 sub-question chunks, and 416 total Chroma documents. The conditional surface-code-oop case is included because inspected OOP chunks have has_code=true and visible Java code-like text.
name: cambridge_fixture_v1
